floor_history.headline: fable-blitz recon: phi-variable is LOAD-BEARING (delay-slot li at 0x25CDC + fallthrough re-set at 0x25CF4 require the two-set shape); tension with 2026-07-01 dead-store/duplicated-into-arms sanctions

frontier.hypothesis: Duplicate the full store into both arms (`D_800A31D8 = 1;` in then-arm and else-arm, no intermediate local) and check whether cross-jump merges only the sb (leaving per-arm li for reorg to steal) or the whole li+sb pair (collapse, no match)
frontier.mechanism: jump2 find_cross_jump suffix-merge vs reorg.c own-thread delay-slot steal ordering
frontier.next_probe: sandbox func_80035480 --disable all with the duplicated-store variant; diff emitted slot at 0x25CDC

frontier.hypothesis: If duplication collapses, keep the current two-set local but re-spell per dead-store-fake-exception: `D_800A31D8 = 1;` after the if as the real statement + FAKE-annotated `v0`-set inside the else arm - i.e. the sanctioned spelling of the same two-set-arm mechanism
frontier.mechanism: jump.c/reorg.c single-set precondition break (dead-store-fake-exception confirmed closure shape)
frontier.next_probe: await ruling_question resolution, then sweep the 2-3 spellings via tools/sweep_variants.py

frontier.hypothesis: Else-arm-only assignment with if/else inverted (`if (D_800A31D8 == 0) { D_800A31D8 = 1; } else { obj_InitAll(); ...; D_800A31D8 = 1; }`) changes branch sense; verify beqz (not bnez) survives
frontier.mechanism: jump.c branch-sense canonicalization + reorg steal from the now-explicit taken arm
frontier.next_probe: sandbox the inverted form; check branch opcode at 0x25CD8 stays beqz

judge_constraints: REGRESSION DIAGNOSIS (completion bar: match must land WITHOUT this construct family): phi-variable-for-delay-slot-steal cheat: `s32 v0` assigned 1 in BOTH branches then `D_800A31D8 = v0` — both arms assign the same constant, so the intermediate has no semantic purpose; its sole effect is to create a phi-node that allows GCC reorg.c to steal `addiu $v0, 1` (else-branch body) into the beqz delay slot. Fails test 1 (no semantic purpose — `D_800A31D8 = 1` after the if is equivalent) and test 3 (GCC-internals mechanism: delay-slot fill via phi-variable). Not in SOTN-accepted list. Fix: find pure-C structure where the delay slot fills naturally (real data dependency, or different if/else shape), OR confirm the slot must be nop and verify that is also byte-correct. Do not commit until the phi-variable intermediary is removed.  (committed code flagged by the re-audit patrol; review and re-do in pure C if confirmed. The byte-correct construct stays on main until a clean replacement lands.)
